title: The farmer's guide to using 10 herbal tinctures for body odor
description: Melaleuca alternifolia tinctures, also known as tea tree oil tinctures, are a natural remedy for body odor. This is because Melaleuca alternifolia contains compounds like cineole and terpinen-4-ol, which have antibacterial and antifungal properties. These properties help reduce the growth of bacteria and fungi that cause body odor. If you experience body odor, consider taking a few drops of Melaleuca alternifolia tincture in a carrier oil like coconut or jojoba oil and apply it to the ...
